This is a 'demo version' of the game In The City
It contains none of the story elements of the final game, but demonstrates the game systems as a playable trailer.
You will be given the opportunity to pick a character class from one of 3 choices: survivalist, negotiator, and technologist.
Survivalist is a rogue/fighter style class,
Negotiator is a bard, more or less, but is the most balanced of the 3 classes.
Your character opens their eyes slowly.
The air is damp and smells faintly of mildew.
Light spills in through a cracked window, illuminating motes of dust that hover lazily.
You're lying on cold, splintered floorboards.
A sharp ache in your ribs suggests you fell, or were dropped, but you don't remember how you got here.
As you shift to get up, the floor groans around you.
Cracks snake through the walls, paint peels and doors hang ajar.
Somewhere outside, far off, you think you hear the faint echo of footsteps -- or maybe it's just the wind.
There is no one else here.
